design_philosophy.mission: Merge the warmth of human trust with the precision of Swiss data design.
principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix botanical warmth with architectural precision.
Emotion First: Onboarding reduces anxiety; Admin induces focus.
Content is King: Every step in the loan application tells a story of progress.
Zoom In: Use large, detailed imagery for loan types (Home, Car) to evoke desire.
Negative Space: 3x more padding than standard SaaS to prevent cognitive overload.
Contrast: High contrast for accessibility and 'Swiss Style' authority.

grid_systems.customer_onboarding: Single column, centered max-w-2xl, gentle vertical rhythm.
grid_systems.admin_dashboard: Bento Grid Mode B: High Density. Sidebar fixed left (w-64). Main content grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4. Gap-4.

containers.card_style: rounded-xl border border-border bg-card shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-300

buttons.primary: rounded-full px-8 py-3 bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 transition-transform active:scale-95 shadow-lg shadow-primary/20
buttons.secondary: rounded-full px-8 py-3 bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/90 transition-transform active:scale-95
buttons.outline: rounded-full px-8 py-3 border-2 border-primary text-primary hover:bg-primary/5
buttons.admin_action: rounded-md px-4 py-2 bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 text-sm font-medium

inputs.customer: h-14 rounded-lg border-2 border-input bg-background px-4 text-lg focus:border-primary focus:ring-4 focus:ring-primary/10 transition-all placeholder:text-muted-foreground/50
inputs.admin: h-9 rounded-md border border-input bg-background px-3 text-sm focus:border-primary focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20

cards.loan_option: group relative overflow-hidden rounded-2xl border bg-card p-6 hover:border-primary transition-colors cursor-pointer

icons.style: Stroke width 1.5px for Customer, 2px for Admin.

underwriting_rules_ui.score_visualization: Radial Progress Chart (0-100). Green > 80, Yellow 50-80, Red < 50.
underwriting_rules_ui.logic_builder: Visual node editor or simple 'If/Then' card list. Use distinct icons for conditions (Credit Score, Income, Debt).

universal_guidelines: Do not use generic 'Inter' for headings.
Use 2-3x more spacing than typical designs.

tech_stack_recommendations.frontend: React 18, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion, React Hook Form, Zod
